summary: Resolved conflicts in .review-feedback.txt, costEngine.ts, and costEngine.test.ts by choosing the origin/main version for all three files, as it represented a more complete and better-designed implementation.
strategyUsed: Chose origin/main for all three conflicted files: (1) .review-feedback.txt — origin/main was more specific and accurate about PR #400; (2) costEngine.ts — origin/main added TypeScript interfaces for all function params, input validation (zero/negative guards), and the missing iceCo2PerMile function; (3) costEngine.test.ts — updated tests to match the origin/main API (object params) and added iceCo2PerMile test coverage. All costEngine tests pass after resolution.
